---
name: Documentation & DX Improvement
about: Report confusing setup steps, unclear errors, or missing docs
title: '[DX] '
labels: documentation, dx
assignees: ''
---

## What were you trying to do?

Describe the task you were working on (e.g., "Setting up the project for the first time", "Building the MuleSoft APIs").

## What was confusing or broken?

Describe the roadblock you hit. Be specific -- what step in the process, what error message, what was unclear.

## What did you expect?

How should the experience have worked? What information was missing?

## How did you work around it?

If you found a solution, share it here so we can bake it into the project.

## Suggested improvement

How would you improve this for the next developer?

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 + WSL)
- **How you set up**: (setup.sh / Docker / manual)
- **Cursor IDE**: Yes / No
